ship_criterion: routing-(B) non-inferiority: ci_lower >= -2pp AND pass_d2_security AND protected_retained. The two-sided TOST `equivalent` is the stricter SECONDARY metric and is kept as-measured (a point-better arm fails it on the UPPER bound). Criterion locked at the 25-02 sign-off, reaffirmed at the 26-02 sign-off. NOT a goalpost move.

gate.slack_note: THIN — clears the margin by 0.001 at n=120. An unluckier bootstrap would have flipped it. Recorded, not smoothed.
gate.two_sided_note: kept as-measured; false because the arm may be MORE than 2pp better (upper bound 0.0768), not worse

primary_like_for_like_s1_vs_s1.note: THIS is the evidence the ship rests on — same seed, same stack, apples-to-apples.

pruned_checkpoint_validation.note: physically-pruned checkpoint served UNMASKED (native 224 experts) reproduces the masked-serve rho within noise -> surgery removed the intended tensors

ensemble_confirmation.interpretation: CONFIRMATORY ONLY — proves the pruned checkpoint ensembles without collapse. It is NOT a +6pp pruning gain: ensemble_non_inferior was computed against the SINGLE-SEED full arm (0.7935), and 3-seed ensembling lifts rho on its own. No pruning-attributable gain is claimed from this number.

evidence.stack_caveat: 0.8533 / 0.8134 are bf16-vLLM numbers. v3's shipped 0.8056 and v4's 0.8067 are Q8 GGUF/llama.cpp. Different stacks — NOT comparable until the Phase-27 Q8 conversion measures the pruned v4 on the shipped stack.

size.note: Pruned v4 remains ~3.4 GiB LARGER than v3's Q8. Per the 2026-07-17 user directive this is NOT a ship disqualifier — the newer Qwen3.6 base is preferred over v3's smaller artifact. Projection is linear-scaling; real Q8 size measured at Phase 27.

signoff.decision: approve physical surgery -> ship pruned v4
signoff.note: Human approval reached the executor RELAYED through the orchestrator. This is NOT an independently-verified cryptographic signature and is not recorded as one.

routes_phase_27: Package the PRUNED v4 (models/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-judge-v4-pruned-k224). Canonical model flips v3 -> v4. See .planning/phases/27-packaging-publication-refresh/CONTEXT.md for the v4-canonical decision and the operator-only HF model-card spec.
